title: haplopappus pristiphyllus
intro: Haplopappus pristiphyllus, also known as Silverleaf or Silverleaf Groundsel, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus pristiphyllus include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating digestive problems like diarrhea and irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Haplopappus pristiphyllus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory and digestive health.
